rule_name: CRM function name must have CRM_ prefix and _fn suffix
remediation_guide: Rename the function in CRM Settings → Functions. Use pattern: CRM_VerbNoun_fn

rule_name: CRM custom field API name must be UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
remediation_guide: Rename field API name in CRM Settings → Modules → Fields. Use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE.

rule_name: CRM Boolean field must start with Is_ or Has_
remediation_guide: Rename boolean field to start with Is_ Has_ or Can_.

rule_name: CRM Date field API name must end with _Date
remediation_guide: Rename date field to end with _Date.

rule_name: CRM Blueprint name must end with _BP
remediation_guide: Rename blueprint in CRM Settings → Blueprints.

rule_name: CRM Workflow must follow Module_Trigger_Action format
remediation_guide: Rename workflow in CRM Settings → Automation.

rule_name: CRM Pipeline must follow Market_Product_Pipeline format
remediation_guide: Rename pipeline in CRM Settings → Deals → Pipelines.

rule_name: Creator function must have CRT_ prefix and _fn suffix
remediation_guide: Rename function in Creator → Functions.

rule_name: Creator form names must be PascalCase singular
remediation_guide: Rename form in Creator → Form Properties.

rule_name: Creator report name must follow Entity_ViewType_Filter format
remediation_guide: Rename report in Creator → Reports.

rule_name: People custom function must have PEO_ prefix and _fn suffix
remediation_guide: Rename function in People → Custom Functions.

rule_name: People custom fields must have PEO_ prefix
remediation_guide: Rename field in People → Custom Fields. Prefix with PEO_.

rule_name: People alert name must follow Event_Audience_Alert format
remediation_guide: Rename alert in People → Notifications.

rule_name: Recruit function must have RCT_ prefix and _fn suffix
remediation_guide: Rename function in Recruit → Custom Functions.

rule_name: Recruit workflow must follow Module_Trigger_Action format
remediation_guide: Rename workflow in Recruit → Automation.

rule_name: Zoho Form name must follow Purpose_Audience_vN format
remediation_guide: Rename form in Zoho Forms. Pattern: Purpose_Audience_vN.

rule_name: Forms integration name must have FRM_ prefix
remediation_guide: Rename integration in Zoho Forms → Integrations.

rule_name: Forms notification must follow Form_Event_Recipient format
remediation_guide: Rename notification in Zoho Forms → Notifications.

rule_name: Analytics workspace must follow Domain_Team_Workspace format
remediation_guide: Rename workspace in Analytics → Settings.

rule_name: Analytics table must have module prefix (CRM_ PEOPLE_ etc.)
remediation_guide: Rename table in Analytics with the correct module prefix.

rule_name: Analytics report must follow Module_Metric_TimeRange format
remediation_guide: Rename report in Analytics.

rule_name: Analytics dashboard must follow Audience_Domain_Dashboard format
remediation_guide: Rename dashboard in Analytics.

rule_name: Sigma extension unique name must have fci_ prefix
remediation_guide: Update extension unique name in Sigma Marketplace manifest.

rule_name: Sigma widget component names must be kebab-case
remediation_guide: Rename component in Sigma extension manifest.

rule_name: Sigma connection names must be lowercase_underscore
remediation_guide: Rename connection in Sigma extension manifest.

rule_name: Sigma function names must be kebab-case verb-noun
remediation_guide: Rename function to verb-noun kebab-case in Sigma extension.

rule_name: Analytics SQL sub-query count must be 5 or fewer
remediation_guide: Refactor the SQL. Split into multiple reports or use pre-aggregated tables. See 08_Analytics_Standards.md Section 4.

rule_name: Analytics SQL must not use SELECT *
remediation_guide: Replace SELECT * with an explicit column list in the report SQL.

rule_name: Analytics SQL keywords must be UPPERCASE
remediation_guide: Convert all SQL keywords (SELECT FROM WHERE etc.) to uppercase.

rule_name: No hardcoded API keys or tokens in Deluge functions
expected_value: All credentials via Zoho Connections or Org Variables
remediation_guide: Move credentials to Zoho Connections or Org Variables. Never put API keys or passwords in function code.

rule_name: No PII (name email phone) in info log statements
expected_value: No personal data in info() calls
remediation_guide: Remove personal data fields from all info() statements. Use record IDs only for logging.

rule_name: Sensitive fields (salary medical) must have role restrictions
remediation_guide: Set field-level permissions in People/CRM field settings. Restrict salary to HR and Director roles only.

rule_name: External API calls must use Zoho Connections not raw tokens
expected_value: All invokeurl calls use connection parameter
remediation_guide: Replace any hardcoded Bearer tokens in invokeurl with connection:"connection_name".

rule_name: No OAuth tokens or API keys in widget JavaScript
expected_value: Widgets use ZOHO SDK only — no tokens in JS
remediation_guide: Remove any API keys from widget JS files. Use ZOHO.CREATOR.API or ZOHO.CRM.API via the SDK.

rule_name: No console.log statements in production widget code
remediation_guide: Remove all console.log statements. Use a DEBUG_MODE gate if debug logging is needed.

rule_name: No var keyword in widget JavaScript
remediation_guide: Replace all var declarations with const (preferred) or let.

rule_name: Branch name must follow feature/fix/improve/security/release/hotfix pattern
remediation_guide: Rename the branch: git branch -m old-name feature/correct-name

rule_name: Commit message must follow [MODULE] type: description format
remediation_guide: Amend commit: git commit --amend -m "[MODULE] feat: description"

rule_name: No secrets or credentials in git commits
expected_value: No API keys tokens or passwords in any committed file
remediation_guide: Use git-filter-repo or BFG to remove secrets from history. Add secret to .gitignore immediately.

rule_name: Release tags must follow semantic versioning vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH
remediation_guide: Re-tag the release: git tag -d old-tag && git tag v1.0.0 && git push --tags

rule_name: Catalyst function must start with use strict
expected_value: 'use strict'; at top of function file
remediation_guide: Add 'use strict'; as the first line of every Catalyst function file.

rule_name: Catalyst function must export async (context basicIO)
remediation_guide: Update function export signature to: module.exports = async (context, basicIO) => {}

rule_name: Catalyst package.json must use exact versions (no ^ or ~)
remediation_guide: Remove ^ and ~ from all production dependencies in package.json. Use exact versions.

rule_name: Widget must have index.html app.js and style.css
remediation_guide: Create missing files in the widget folder. All three are required.

rule_name: Widget HTML must use semantic elements (article section header) not div-soup
remediation_guide: Replace generic divs with semantic elements: article section header main nav.

rule_name: CRM batch operations must not exceed 100 records per call
remediation_guide: Split batches into chunks of 100. Use pagination for large data sets.

rule_name: CRM getRecords/search must paginate for results over 200
remediation_guide: Add pagination loop to any getRecords/searchRecords call that may return more than 200 records.

rule_name: Analytics hard limit of 5 sub-queries per SQL report
remediation_guide: Exceeding 5 sub-queries will cause the query to fail with no partial results. Redesign the query.
